title: AI revolution is ‘50x bigger’ than the dot-com boom: SoftBank's Masayoshi Son to CNBC
summary_full: The AI revolution will be 50 times bigger than the dot-com revolution in the 2000s, SoftBank CEO Masayoshi Son told CNBC Monday.
summary_public: The AI revolution will be 50 times bigger than the dot-com revolution in the 2000s, SoftBank CEO Masayoshi Son told CNBC Monday.
